text.title: cqrs-pattern Failure Modes
text.summary: Failure modes observed when applying the cqrs-pattern methodology. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: OrderHandler.handle(...) does both write and read; tests are confusing; coupling reappears.
GetOrderHandler updates a counter on read; data drifts.
antipattern.fix: Move the counter increment to a CommandHandler triggered explicitly; queries stay pure reads.

antipattern.symptom: Handlers import each other; CQRS topology becomes a spaghetti graph.
antipattern.fix: Add a Mediator + register handlers at composition root.

antipattern.symptom: Read side lags writes by 2 seconds; users see stale data; team blames 'eventual consistency'.
antipattern.fix: Measure projection_lag_ms_p95; publish SLO; reduce via projection-restart automation.
